prompt:
Reference image role: the previous blog thumbnail (mountains + glowing cube) defines the style — Chinese ink-wash painting fused with one soft modern tech metaphor, warm muted parchment-green background, low contrast, painterly soft edges. PRESERVE this style exactly.

Create a 16:9 blog thumbnail for article "PyTorch 调度器干货大合集 / Dispatcher". NO text.

Subject: Ink-wash painting of a quiet bamboo grove on the left and an open ancient unfurled scroll in the foreground center, painted in soft grey-black brush strokes. From the scroll, multiple thin golden #C0A35D branching paths emerge upward and diverge like a dispatch tree, with tiny firefly cyan #9CF0BD dots at each branch tip. Mist drifts in the background.

Style: Brush-painted, atmospheric, low contrast, suggests "ancient document reveals modern routing paths". Same warm parchment-green background as reference.

Color HEX: ink black #1a1d1c, mist grey #3a4540, paper warm #2a3128, cyan glow #9CF0BD, gold lines #C0A35D.

Avoid: real text, characters, photographic realism, neon, red, purple, modern digital illustration, cartoonish.
